title: #5 - Everything you need to know about your shipping methods.
bodyHtml:
What are the shipping requirements in Back Market ?

In order to create your shipping methods you first need to create your listings. Delivery options are key when purchasing online, and a better delivery experience for our customers means more sales for you. Rules are defined by size of products (size XS, S, M, L or XL), please find more details in the table below.

 

 

Included shipping fees are a standard of e-commerce, although you have the freedom to determine your own shipping costs. 

 

For a product listing to be published, you must offer a standard home shipping option included in the price of the product (i.e., free of charge for the customer). You may offer additional paid options alongside the mandatory free one, as long as you respect the price limits per category.

 

A maximum shipping time applies to the standard home shipping option. 

 

Scenario: Customer orders a smartphone on Monday at 11:00 AM (before 1 PM cut-off)

 

  • Standard delivery: You must ship the same day (Monday), and the customer receives it by Wednesday at the latest (≤ 2 business days transit).
  • Express delivery: You must ship the same day (Monday), and the customer receives it by Tuesday at the latest (≤ 1 business day transit), for a max fee of 5 €.

How is preparation time calculated?

Please note that:

 

  • The default cut-off time is 1:00 PM. You may update this setting in your Back-Office; however, it can only be set after 1:00 PM.

Here’s how shipping deadlines are calculated:

 

  1. The shipping process begins when your customer’s order is confirmed by Back Market and ends when the first attempt to deliver the product is made. 
  2. Shipping is advertised to your customers in business days, but as the Back Office operates in hours for maximum accuracy, shipping timeframes are rounded up to the next whole number.

Learn more about setting up your shipping methods

Learn more about recommended shipping providers

 

How to add new shipping methods ? 

Now that you know the requirements, add as many markets as possible to your shipping methods, click on the section ‘Options’ then ‘Shipping’ and you’ll be able to add your options for delivery in each country you intend to sell.

 

You’ll be able to choose the carrier for each category you are listing, if you don’t have listings in that category it won’t show as an option. 

 

 

Back Market provides sellers with shipping and packaging services, known as BackShip and BackPack.

 

Don't worry if you don't see them yet ! These services become available immediately after you complete the onboarding process and your account is validated.

 

REMINDER: 

Your listings and your account will appear as “Offline” until your account will be validated by the Activation team.

 

Once you have completed all the sections of the onboarding, please send an email to activation-eu@backmarket.com

 

Need help? Don't hesitate to reach out to the Back Market team at activation-eu@backmarket.com
